# Castle Express Moving & Storage

> Family-owned moving company serving Hartford County CT and Western Massachusetts since 2013. Licensed and insured. 5 trucks, 5,000 sq ft facility in Enfield CT.

## Business Information
- Founded: 2013
- Location: 4 Niblick Rd Unit A, Enfield, CT 06082
- Phone: (888) 553-4503
- License: USDOT 2307446, MC-990616, CT Permit C-1768
- Service area: Hartford County CT, Tolland County CT, Western Massachusetts

## Services
- Local moving (residential and commercial)
- Long distance moving
- Packing and unpacking services
- Climate-controlled storage
- Piano and specialty moving
- Princess Packing (white-glove packing add-on)

## Service Areas Connecticut
Enfield, Suffield, Somers, Ellington, East Windsor, Windsor Locks, Windsor, Glastonbury, Avon, West Hartford, Bloomfield, Simsbury, Farmington, Newington, Granby, East Granby, Tolland, Vernon, Stafford, Willington, and surrounding towns. Villages served include Thompsonville, Hazardville, Scitico, Broad Brook, Warehouse Point, Crystal Lake, Somersville, West Suffield.

## Service Areas Massachusetts
Springfield, Agawam, West Springfield, Chicopee, Holyoke, Longmeadow, East Longmeadow, Ludlow, Southwick, Westfield, and surrounding towns. Villages served include Feeding Hills, North Agawam, Agawam Center.

## About
Castle Express Moving and Storage is a family-owned and operated moving company founded by Joseph Caronna in 2013. We serve residential and commercial clients with experienced crews, accurate estimates, and no hidden fees. We are BBB accredited since 2014.
